description_long: This kiosk consists of two distinct display units, both branded with the Chupa Chups logo. The left unit is a rectangular, multi-shelf display rack with four transparent shelves, each holding rows of colorful donuts or confectionery items, and a rounded top with a prominent logo sign. The right unit is a cylindrical, rotating display case with three internal shelves, also filled with donuts or similar treats, and a rounded red top with vertical rods holding lollipops. Both units feature a red and white color scheme, with transparent panels for product visibility and bold branding. The materials appear to be primarily plastic and acrylic, with some metal rods and internal supports. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, intended to attract attention in a commercial or urban setting.
description: A modern, dual-unit Chupa Chups kiosk with a rectangular multi-shelf rack and a cylindrical rotating display, both featuring transparent panels and bold red-and-white branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the rectangular shelf unit with four rows of donuts and the cylindrical display with visible internal shelves and prominent Chupa Chups logos.
description_view_1: Side/top view highlighting the cylindrical display's rounded top, vertical rods with lollipops, and the depth of both units.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the rectangular unit with minimal branding and the transparent back of the cylindrical display.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the solid red side panel of the rectangular unit and the profile of the cylindrical display.
attribute_signage_type: Printed logo signs on rounded top panels of both units, with 'Chupa Chups' text and floral border, integrated into the structure above the display shelves.
attribute_window_presence: Transparent acrylic panels on front and sides of both units; no traditional windows.
attribute_roof_design: Rounded, domed tops in red plastic with integrated signage; no overhangs or awnings.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern commercial with playful, branded elements.
